backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Raj Empire Esports backend, defining data types and state for users, tournaments, registrations, support tickets, OTPs, and social links, with access-controlled query/update methods for player and admin operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two UI changes: replacing custom auth buttons with a single 'Connect with Internet Identity' button on both the RegisterPage Step 2 and LoginPage, with high confidence and specific file targets.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference document for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Raj Empire Esports frontend, loading Google Fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron, Saira Condensed) and mounting the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application file that configures TanStack Router with all routes (home, register, login, tournaments, dashboard, terms, admin), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider, AuthProvider, and AdminAuthProvider, and exports the RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminProtectedRo: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated admin users to /admin using AdminAuthContext, rendering children only when isAdminAuthenticated is true.
frontend/src/components/AuthMethodButton: Reusable authentication method selector component rendering Google, Apple, Microsoft, and Passkey buttons (or a loading spinner) that all invoke a single onMethodClick callback.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, and social media icons (YouTube, Instagram, Telegram) fetched from a query hook.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, and conditional auth controls (login/register or dashboard/logout) based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a Header, Footer, and a flex-column container, rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/PaymentModal.tsx: Modal dialog for joining a tournament by spending wallet coins, showing balance, entry fee, and handling success/error states via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: HOC that redirects unauthenticated users to the login page and renders children only when the player is authenticated.
frontend/src/context/AdminAuthContext.ts: React context providing admin authentication state persisted in localStorage, with login/logout functions and legacy compatibility aliases.
frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx: React context managing player session state (mobile, displayName, bgmiPlayerId) persisted in localStorage, with login and logout helpers that also clear the React Query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing admin access control when a token is present and invalidating dependent queries on actor change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend actor calls, covering tournaments, registrations, players, payment proofs, withdrawals, support tickets, social links, terms, and wallet operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Orbitron/Rajdhani/Exo 2 fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds brand gradient and scrollbar utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, mounting it to the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with a collapsible sidebar for navigating between sections (tournaments, registrations, players, payments, withdrawals, support, social links, terms) and uses admin-specific query hooks to manage all platform data.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Two-phase admin login page that validates hardcoded credentials for each phase sequentially before calling adminLogin() and redirecting to the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Player dashboard page with a responsive sidebar for navigating profile, tournaments, wallet, withdrawals, and support sections, using player-specific query hooks to display and manage user data.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing page featuring a hero section with CTA buttons linking to tournaments and registration, followed by a features grid highlighting the platform's key selling points.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, fetches their profile from the backend actor, and redirects to the player dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Multi-step registration page that collects display name, mobile, and BGMI Player ID, then authenticates with Internet Identity and saves the profile to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Displays the platform's Terms & Conditions fetched from the backend, falling back to hardcoded content, with parsed numbered sections rendered in a styled layout.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentsPage.tsx: Lists all BGMI tournaments with search and status filter controls, allowing authenticated users to register via a PaymentModal or redirecting unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand colors, fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Exo 2), shadows, gradients, and animation plugins for the esports arena UI.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for the Raj Empire Esports web app, documenting known authentication issues (stuck 'Connecting...' state, non-clickable buttons) and fix requirements to replace custom auth buttons with a single Internet Identity popup button on both RegisterPage Step 2 and LoginPage.
